identity.sql: SELECT CAST(x AS SMALLDECIMAL) FROM t
SELECT CAST(x AS SECONDDATE) FROM t
SELECT CAST(x AS ALPHANUM) FROM t
SELECT CAST(x AS NVARCHAR(255)) FROM t
SELECT CAST(x AS CLOB) FROM t
SELECT CAST(x AS NCLOB) FROM t
SELECT CAST(x AS BINARY) FROM t
SELECT CAST(x AS FLOAT) FROM t
identity.expected: SELECT CAST(x AS DOUBLE) FROM t
identity.description: CAST to FLOAT transformed to DOUBLE (HANA FLOAT is 64-bit)

transpilation.sql: CREATE TABLE t (id INTEGER, name NVARCHAR(100), salary SMALLDECIMAL, created SECONDDATE)

transpilation.description: HANA types in CREATE TABLE transpilation
